info.name: Castello Restaurant Management API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Castello Restaurant Management System.

**Setup:**
1. Set `baseUrl` variable to your server (default: http://localhost:5000/api/v1)
2. Run **Admin Login** → `adminToken` is auto-saved
3. Run **User Login** → `token` is auto-saved

**Currency:** ISK (kr) — Iceland

item.name: Get Product by ID (with variants & toppings)
